page_metadata.biotools__summary: NoLiTiA is a free, open-source Matlab toolbox for nonlinear time series analysis. It incorporates methods from dynamical systems theory, recurrence quantification analysis and information theory.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NoLiTiA is a free, open-source Matlab toolbox for nonlinear time series analysis. It incorporates methods from dynamical systems theory, recurrence quantification analysis and information theory.
